title: EQ - Select a value, close the Settings screen, reopen it - the selected value persists
scenario: EQ setting persists correctly after navigating away from and back to Device Settings on Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Navigate to Home screen and tap on the connected Poly Bluetooth audio device.
3. Go to Device Settings → Audio Settings → Equalizer.
4. Select an EQ value (e.g., Bass) from the available options (Bass, Flat, Bright, Custom EQ).
5. Tap the back button or gesture to close the Settings screen and return to the Home screen.
6. Navigate back to Device Settings → Audio Settings → Equalizer.
7. Observe the currently selected EQ value.
8. Repeat steps 3–7 for each remaining EQ value: Flat, Bright, and Custom EQ.
expected: The previously selected EQ value (Bass, Flat, Bright, or Custom EQ) persists and is shown as selected after navigating away from and back to the Equalizer settings.
